command:
echo "=== GITEA ADMIN USERS ==="
sudo -u git /usr/local/bin/gitea admin user list --config /home/jose/gitea/data/gitea/conf/app.ini 2>/dev/null

echo "=== GITEA VERSION ==="
/usr/local/bin/gitea --version

echo "=== CHECK EXISTING REPOS ==="
curl -s http://localhost:3000/api/v1/repos/search?limit=10 | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); [print(r['full_name']) for r in d.get('data',[])]" 2>/dev/null || echo "API check failed"

echo "=== GIT AVAILABLE ==="
which git && git --version
